extraction_reasoning: The litigation summary is in ₹ million and separates matters against from matters by: criminal proceedings against are 5 for the Company, 0 for non-promoter Directors, 1 for Promoters, and 4 for KMP/SMP, while all criminal-by rows (60 Company, 1 Director and 1 Promoter) are excluded; statutory/regulatory-actions-against rows are nil. Tax proceedings are 4 against the Company (and no subsidiary is listed); promoter/director personal tax matters are excluded. The Company-only quantified litigation amount is ₹3.33 million for direct and indirect tax proceedings; criminal Company matters are not ascertainable, so the aggregate is ₹3.33 million ÷ 10 = ₹0.333 crore. Contingent liabilities are stated in the risk factor as aggregating ₹2.97 million as of Fiscal 2025; this stated aggregate, rather than a re-sum of the displayed line items, converts to ₹0.297 crore. Customer concentration is company-wide for Fiscal 2025, the latest full fiscal year, and uses revenue from operations as denominator: top five customers were 51.70% and top ten were 69.47%.
